title: clutia kamerunica
intro: Clutia kamerunica, also known as African clutia or Kamerun clutia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clutia kamerunica include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Clutia kamerunica can be made by infusing the leaves in water to create a tea, and the plant can also be used as a poultice to apply directly to affected areas.
